creator: ar@null.lv
text:
> Also I'd like to suggest to edit category for geany (if you accept
> this I will modify geany-plugins category as well)
> I suggest modifying categories to:
> CATEGORIES=     devel editors
> 
> or even better
> CATEGORIES=     editors devel
> 
> Which effectively moves geany to editors (after all it is an editor)

I definately second "editors" part, but I'm not sure about leaving
"devel". SciTe (editors/scite) is based on Scintilla, same as Geany,
and it has "editors gnome", which would be more appropriate.

That's why I would like to hear what commiter has to say.
